status_summary: Your oxygen is low (94.9%). Today's plan prioritises breathing and recovery.

actions.title: Box Breathing
actions.description: Inhale 4, hold 4, exhale 4, hold 4. Repeat 5 times.

actions.title: Oxygen Recovery Breathing
actions.description: Open a window. Breathe in 6 counts, out 8. Do for 3 minutes.

actions.title: Stress Dump Journal
actions.description: Write everything stressing you — no editing, no judgment.

actions.title: Cold Water Reset
actions.description: Splash cold water on face and wrists for 30 seconds.

actions.title: Moment of Prayer or Stillness
actions.description: 3 minutes of quiet prayer, reflection, or gratitude.
